Issue: does not specify the process for designating a Master user
Correction: The system shall provide an interface for the initial setup where the first user can designate a Master user.

Issue: does not specify the specific hardware and software standards to be used
Correction: The system shall use IEEE 802.11 for wireless communication and TCP/IP for network communication.

Issue: does not specify the types of web-ready devices supported
Correction: The system shall support control via web-ready computers, smartphones, tablets, and PDAs.

Issue: does not specify the process for adding or removing thermostats
Correction: The system shall provide an interface for adding or removing thermostats through the DH web server.

Issue: does not specify the process for adding or removing humidistats
Correction: The system shall provide an interface for adding or removing humidistats through the DH web server.

Issue: does not specify the process for adding or removing contact sensors
Correction: The system shall provide an interface for adding or removing contact sensors through the DH web server.

Issue: does not specify the process for adding or removing power switches
Correction: The system shall provide an interface for adding or removing power switches through the DH web server.

Issue: does not specify total supported number of concurrent users
Correction: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Issue: does not specify the time frame for system recovery
Correction: The system shall recover and restore data within 5 minutes of a failure.

Issue: does not specify the encryption standard to be used
Correction: The system shall use AES-256 encryption for securing user data.

Issue: does not specify the format of the online documentation
Correction: The online documentation shall be provided in HTML and PDF formats.

Label: N/A
Issue: does not include a section on user interface requirements
Correction: The system shall provide a user-friendly graphical interface that is accessible via web browsers and mobile applications.
